reviews.comment:
50 minutos de espera para cargar un solo playero ! El dueño tremendo ratón !!

(Translated by Google)
50-minute wait to fill up a single gas station! The owner is a real cheapskate!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyOVlTbUNREAE

reviews.comment:
Todo lo que dicen arriba es exactamente así.
No entiendo por qué no contratan empleados extra en temporada alta!!!

Y tampoco que no puedan cargar nafta de los dos lados. Casi todos los autos hoy tienen la tapa del lado derecho pero las mangueras en el mundo entero tienen el largo suficiente para cargar del lado opuesto!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Everything they say above is exactly true.
I don't understand why they don't hire extra employees during peak season!!!

And I also don't understand why they can't fill up on both sides. Almost all cars today have the gas cap on the right side, but the hoses all over the world are long enough to fill up on the opposite side!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURybGFfaVR3EAE

reviews.comment:
El surtidor que tiene Infinia no trabaja con la app de YPF. Y el surtidor que sí trabaja con la app de YPF solo tiene súper

(Translated by Google)
The pump that has Infinia doesn't work with the YPF app. And the pump that does work with the YPF app only has Super.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyM3ZEZUNREAE

reviews.comment:
Mucha espera

(Translated by Google)
A long wait
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURya3E2NFd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Deficiente servicio. No hay carteles indicadores de nada. Demoran mucho en cobrar. Se hacen colas eternas. Si pudiera, dejaría cero estrellas. Ponen carteles estúpidos de ponerse en el lado del tanque en la isla y no ponen carteles que digan qué combustible se carga en cada isla. Además no cobran con apps. Los playeros se toman su tiempo para charlar con cualquier vecino. Pasa el tiempo sin que carguen...

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. There are no signs indicating anything. They take forever to pay. The lines are endless. If I could, I'd give it zero stars. They put up stupid signs telling you to stand on the side of the tank at the pump island, but they don't have signs indicating which fuel is dispensed at each island. They also don't accept payments through apps. The attendants take their time chatting with other customers. Time passes without them filling up...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyaklDZjZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Demoras de 45 minutos a 1 hora con 4 autos. Te cargan solo del lado donde está el tanque. Un solo playero. Inviertan para recibir beneficios.. terrible paciencia

(Translated by Google)
Delays of 45 minutes to 1 hour with 4 cars. They only fill you up on the side where the tank is. Just one attendant. Invest to see the benefits... terrible patience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyak1Da1V3EAE

reviews.comment:
La verdad ni una estrella necesita porque, cuando llegas muchas veces no tienen gasoil. No sirve mucho ir y que no tengan lo esencial de una estacion de servicio. Encima horrible la atencion

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, it doesn't even deserve one star because, when you arrive, they often don't have diesel. It's not very useful to go and find they don't have the essentials of a gas station. On top of that, the service is awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURya0pqSkVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Un playero para una isla, haces 2hs de cola y al llegar te dicen que solo podés usar la aplicación ypf en la otra isla cosa que me parece ridícula ya que es ypf.

(Translated by Google)
A gas station for one island, you wait in line for 2 hours and when you arrive they tell you that you can only use the YPF app on the other island, which seems ridiculous to me since it's YPF.
